sections.paragraph:
Original: נוּס

Transliteration: nûs

Phonetic: noos

BDB Definition:

  1. to flee, escape
    1. (Qal)
      1. to flee
      2. to escape
      3. to take flight, depart, disappear
      4. to fly (to the attack) on horseback
    2. (Polel) to drive at
    3. (Hithpolel) to take flight
    4. (Hiphil)
      1. to put to flight
      2. to drive hastily
      3. to cause to disappear, hide

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1327

Part(s) of speech: Verb
